arts.ttl: Lazio Director Backs Marco Baroni but Three Potential Replacements Emerge
arts.sum: Lazio sporting director Angelo Fabiani offered some reassuring words on the future of Marco Baroni, but the Italian media is suggesting three potential replacements. arts.sum: After their European heartbreak, Lazio will be eager to finish their Serie A campaign on a high note, and their final gauntlet begins with an away fixture in Genoa.
